sys_script.name: Deduct spare part quantity

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_75db8baa937503109b2db5edfaba1094
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_2103100_indust_0_parts_used</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Deduct spare part quantity</name><order>200</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {
    var part = new GlideRecord('x_2103100_indust_0_spare_part');
    if (part.get(current.spare_part)) {
        part.quantity_in_stock = part.quantity_in_stock - current.quantity_used;
        part.update();
    }
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-07-03 22:23:31</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>75db8baa937503109b2db5edfaba1094</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Deduct spare part quantity</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Industrial Asset Management" source="x_2103100_indust_0">b560f4b393610b109b2db5edfaba1005</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Industrial Asset Management">b560f4b393610b109b2db5edfaba1005</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_75db8baa937503109b2db5edfaba1094</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-07-06 12:41:11</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=75db8baa937503109b2db5edfaba1094"/></record_update>
